session.assistant:
Perfect! All the changes have been successfully applied. Let me create a summary document:
## Summary
I have successfully completed the bulk rename of JSON output field names in the Python exec scripts. Here's what was changed:
### Part A: Renamed `"plan_url"` → `"pr_url"` (5 files, 8 locations)
1. **plan_update.py** (line 169) - Changed: `"plan_url": plan_result.url,` → `"pr_url": plan_result.url,`
2. **plan_save.py** (line 348) - Changed: `"plan_url": result.url,` → `"pr_url": result.url,`
3. **create_impl_context_from_plan.py** (line 89) - Changed: `"plan_url": plan.url,` → `"pr_url": plan.url,`
4. **setup_impl_from_pr.py** (3 locations) - Line 211: `"plan_url": pr_url,` → `"pr_url": pr_url,` - Line 257: `"plan_url": existing_ref.url,` → `"pr_url": existing_ref.url,` - Line 298: `"plan_url": pr_url,` → `"pr_url": pr_url,`
5. **create_pr_from_session.py** (2 locations) - Line 12 (docstring): Updated JSON example from `"plan_url"` to `"pr_url"` - Line 124: `"plan_url": result.pr_url,` → `"pr_url": result.pr_url,`
### Part B: Renamed `"plan_title"` → `"pr_title"` (2 files, 4 locations)
1. **setup_impl_from_pr.py** (3 locations) - Line 213: `"plan_title": plan_title,` → `"pr_title": plan_title,` - Line 259: `"plan_title": "",` → `"pr_title": "",` - Line 300: `"plan_title": pr_result.title,` → `"pr_title": pr_result.title,`
2. **incremental_dispatch.py** (line 167) - Changed: `"plan_title": pr_result.title,` → `"pr_title": pr_result.title,`
**Important note:** Only STRING KEYS in JSON dicts were renamed. Python variable names like `plan_title` (the variable itself, not the dict key) were left unchanged, as well as docstring examples that weren't in the specified locations.
All files are located at: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_update.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_save.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/create_impl_context_from_plan.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/setup_impl_from_pr.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/create_pr_from_session.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/incremental_dispatch.py`
